title: McDonald's Snack Wrap is Back
transcript:
McDonald's snack wrap was first introduced way back in 2006 to huge popularity.
Then nine years ago, poof, it disappeared.
Fans of the Crispy Chicken Wrap have been pleading for its return ever since.
"You thought they didn't see your comments, petitions and posts?"
Well, starting today, the snack wrap is back.
All the morning shows took a bite out of the story.
The snack wrap is a strip of fried chicken wrapped inside a tortilla.
It comes with either ranch or spicy sauce,
and maybe most importantly, it costs only 2.99.
So what do customers think of the reboot?
"Mmm, I missed it. I haven't had it in a long time."
"Tastes amazing."
McDonald's release of the snack wrap is reigniting the fast food Chicken Wars
Popeyes, KFC and Burger King all have their versions of the treat
and Sonic is trying to undercut McDonald's.
Their wrap is a dollar cheaper.
"For only $1.99 Sonic crispy tender wraps..."
"When your clientele is telling you they really like something...."
"...in this environment where every dollar matters and food is expensive,"
"you gotta listen!"
"A meal for 3 bucks? We'll take it."
"So good."
"I'm so happy it's back."
